title: session.v1
description: A completed work session as a typed, signed record: the atom of an agent's work history. Minted by `treeship session close` from the session's own sealed evidence (never hand-written), and carried as the payload of a Treeship receipt artifact with kind=session.v1. See docs/specs/work-history.md.

actor.description: Actor URI the session ran as, e.g. agent://hermes.

headline.description: One-line human narrative of the session, from the sealed receipt.

outcome.description: How the session ended: completed | abandoned | failed.

harness.description: Capture surface(s) the session ran under: distinct tool runtime ids from the sealed receipt (e.g. 'claude-code'), or 'cli' when no tool runtime was involved.

attestation_class.description: How the record's evidence was captured, per the work-history ladder: self (the agent's own receipts, no external signal), runtime (events emitted by a harness hook or bridge the agent cannot forge or omit), countersigned (a second party signed evidence in the package, e.g. consumed human approvals). Labeled, never laundered; 'anchored' is a later, derivable state (publish + witness), not set at close.

action_count.description: Signed artifacts in the session chain.

approval_count.description: Approval uses consumed during the session (each backed by a signed grant embedded in the package).

event_count.description: Events in the sealed session event log.

tools_exercised.description: Tool names actually invoked during the session, computed from captured events (never hand-written). Feeds capability cards' `exercised` grade.

receipt_digest.description: Digest of the sealed session receipt (receipt.json) this record summarizes; binds the record to its evidence.

receipt_merkle_root.description: Merkle root of the sealed .treeship package, when composed.

report_url.description: Published session report URL, when one exists.
